name: Green Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice in boiling salted water for 12 minutes, or until just tender.
2. Rinse well with cold water and drain completely.
3. Allow the rice to cool until it is at room temperature.
4. Place the rice into a serving bowl and stir in the fenugreek sprouts.
5. Add the watercress leaves, parsley, and chives.
6. Mix together the olive oil, wine vinegar, salt, and pepper in a separate small bowl.
7. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss well to combine all ingredients evenly.
